name: agentic-runner
description: Agentic Runner explicit-only: named requests, existing .agentic-runner state, or its source CLI continuation, audit, and repair. Generic orchestration never auto-routes here.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit-only Agentic Runner for named requests or existing .agentic-runner state/Agentic Runner source CLI continuation, audit, and repair.
interface.longDescription: Legacy control-plane selected only by its name, existing .agentic-runner state, or Agentic Runner source CLI request. Generic orchestration, mixed work, supervision, delegation, and subagent coordination do not auto-route here.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Runner only when named, or to continue, audit, or repair existing .agentic-runner state or source CLI.
